Or
I just do my barrier team again lmao
who do y'all think is the best character for team sustain/healing?
depends on what the team wants tbh
there's an argument for all of them
if you want more aggressive, targetable, and more arith on demand, gdoll is normally the go to
if you run a comp that plays around silverheart, or burst in some ways, celeste ability to revive and deal massive damage for 1 arith based on no. of team members dead is good
Leigh is like, max arith I think? alongside aggro
doll provides just generic good things, and is nice when you rely heavily on a single character too
thais is great for teams which want to exalt fast, with powerful exalts
oh, i mean just in terms of raw healing
like who can output the most consistent healing
oh sheer healing? hmm.. I want to argue that'd be doll tbh
since she has x2 heal skill cards, one aoe, one specific, and exalt revives for 30 hp
corpo is more of a burst healer, leigh is delayed unless you use smth else that already gave delayed healing beforehand, celeste is revive + delayed healing and x1 taunt + heal 20 card
or was that the aliemus one? I may be mixing things up
but ye
gdoll heal output is also quite good
but reliant on her 3 cost aoe heal, and then her exalt- which you may prefer to use to kill the opponent instead
you dont use healers to heal
theyre a strategic unit
objective is to beat opponent
oh i know i was just curious who they've balanced to be 'strongest' for that
Can't you just look at the healer kits for the highest green number
yeah but consistency matters right? corpo's healing card is good but only having one means overall she probably puts out less
i mean it might be simple as numbers but idk i figured traphase folks might have some unique insight
From my experience doll provides pretty constant healing

To be fair
Some of them do heal quite good enough for it to be part of the main team gameplan
But there are wods that seem to be pretty effective at healing as well
Like Doll who also cleanses
This seems vague. Do characters like doll not use their healing cards to heal?
ill just copy paste a thing

"The problem with green heroes and their defensive skills is that in a race to fight each other to 0, spending mana on pure healing skills with no mechanics added is really bad at higher average level."

Idk if there are any units that dont contribute at least some damage and they can help your team by keeping your damage dealing units alive. I dont really care enough to click on what you linked but  i think youre being somewhat reductive on the roll that sustain plays. Realistically wouldnt that reasoning apply to non card games too? Take overwatch for example, a character like mercy who almost exclusively provides sustain to the team via healing and reviving still serves a function by enabling the damage dealers to continue dealing damage and its almost certainly better to have her on the team rather than running only damage dealers/tanks

dead units are too strong in Morimens PVP
It makes a unit absolutely safe, preventing the opponent to further interacts with it, and it prevents the dead unit cards to fill your hand 
While transforming the cards left of this unit in your hand, into useful alumnius boost
I guess it is true that morimens does have that added function strengthening your hand by keeping certain units dead

It isnt kinda unfortunate you cant see your opponents team comp before playing them. I guess its just the nature of games like this though. In fighting games its harder to learn characters so you can technically counterpick someone if you know who they play and if they solo main then they cant do much about it. In a game like this you could just infinitely adjust your comp as you see your opponent changing theirs though due to it being easier to know how to play teams though. I do think adjusting your team comp to counter your opponents would make the game more fun if it were possible to implement in a balanced manner

I think this is terrible : 
[Traphase]
● Optimized the matching and score earning experience when the season points are below 1500.
    ○ When the Keeper first experiences "Traphase", the number of matches against system preset rivals increases.
    ○ The score of New Player Protection is increased from 1000 to 1500.
    ○ Keepers with less than 1500 points will be more likely to match against system-preset opponents in their next battle after a defeat.
    ○ Keepers with less than 1500 points will be matched against a system preset rival in their first daily battle.
[Interlude]
● The maximum Menophin that can be consumed for a single Reenact has been increased from 300 to 1000.
In practice this will maybe only lead to elo inflation
Forcing players to do more matches if they want to earn the same rewards
